name: freshrss-claude
description: Read, search, and digest your FreshRSS feeds — digests, topic search, a people-centric catch-up, and a subscriptions overview, backed by a bundled FreshRSS MCP server.

freshrss_url.title: FreshRSS URL
freshrss_url.description: Base URL of your FreshRSS instance, e.g. https://freshrss.example.com

freshrss_password.title: FreshRSS API password
freshrss_password.description: Your FreshRSS API password (Settings > Profile > API Management in FreshRSS)
